name: Caribbean Scones
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease a baking sheet. In a medium-sized bowl, sift flour, baking powder, and salt; stir in sugar. In a large bowl, mix mashed potatoes with 1½ tablespoons melted butter using a fork. Add the dry ingredients mixture until well combined to form a soft dough. Turn out onto a floured surface. Roll out or pat into a round about 1/2-inch thick. Cut into rounds using a 2-inch cookie cutter. Place on the prepared baking sheet, spacing 1 to 1½ inches apart. Brush tops with remaining melted butter. Bake for 20 minutes or until light brown. Split and serve warm with butter and honey. Makes about 10 scones.
